mapper.select: SELECT *, (6371000 * 2 * ASIN(SQRT( POWER(SIN(RADIANS(location_lat - #{lat}) / 2), 2) + COS(RADIANS(#{lat})) * COS(RADIANS(location_lat)) * POWER(SIN(RADIANS(location_lng - #{lng}) / 2), 2) ))) AS distance_meters FROM activities WHERE status = 'published' AND location_lat IS NOT NULL AND location_lng IS NOT NULL AND location_lat BETWEEN #{lat} - (#{radiusMeters} / 111000.0) AND #{lat} + (#{radiusMeters} / 111000.0) AND location_lng BETWEEN #{lng} - (#{radiusMeters} / (111000.0 * COS(RADIANS(#{lat})))) AND #{lng} + (#{radiusMeters} / (111000.0 * COS(RADIANS(#{lat})))) HAVING distance_meters <= #{radiusMeters} ORDER BY distance_meters ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM activities WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
